description: AWS costs spike from ~$12K baseline to $18,245 (+50%) — rogue i3.8xlarge instances
detection_hint: Compare Month 8 cloud cost against 90-day moving average. Variance >50% should trigger absolute spike alert.

description: WeWork rent paid twice in same month ($7,000 instead of $3,500)
detection_hint: Two WeWork payments in Month 6 — compare against expected single monthly payment. Timing anomaly: same vendor, same month.

description: Unknown vendor 'DataSync Pro' charges $25,000 — single large transaction, verify legitimacy
detection_hint: New vendor with no prior history makes a $25K charge. Flag: new vendor + amount > $5K threshold.

description: Marketing spend escalates 5x ($3K → $15K/mo) without proportional revenue increase
detection_hint: Marketing spend increases from $3K baseline to $15K by Month 12. Trend detection: >5% sustained monthly increase is unsustainable.

description: Travel expenses 3x normal ($6,000 vs $2,000 avg) — conference season
detection_hint: Travel in Month 11 is $6,000 vs ~$2,000 average. Category spike: 3x historical average triggers alert.

description: Payroll jumps ~$25K/month with 2 simultaneous new hires — unsustainable at current revenue
detection_hint: Payroll jumps from $91,487 to $117,956 in Month 10. Trend: unsustainable payroll growth rate.

description: Largest customer Acme Corp ($8K/mo) churns — MRR drops ~15%
detection_hint: MRR drops from $38,386 to $29,677 in Month 11. Customer churn: Acme Corp ($8K/mo) lost.
